title: Case Studies - Dyalog
excerpt: Click on the images below to read more about the corresponding study.
content_html:
Click on the images below to read more about the corresponding study.

Simulation

In the Southern part of Finland, the Archipelago with its many small islands means that boats are the main means of transport. Navigating the area is extremely complex and can be dangerous and challenging due to traffic density and inclement weather conditions. This case study focuses on Finnish APL programmer Tomas Gustafsson and how he – and a tiny team – developed the incredible Stormwind navigation simulator, which won the Open Data Innovation Contest Apps4Finland in 2013.

Education

Running a newly-established academy for almost 700 primary school children can involve a lot of paperwork. Co-ordinating pick-up and drop-off services, running shuttle buses between multiple sites, taking bookings for before and after school clubs, keeping track of the medical/dietary requirements of each pupil and allowing parents to pre-book school meals can be a logistical nightmare. Dyalog simplified the bureaucracy and restored peace of mind.

Automotive – Production Schedule

The Volvo Car Corporation (Volvo) uses Hercules for planning car production. Its main output is the monthly Master Production Schedule (MPS) – a detailed plan on how many cars are to be produced per market, factory and week during the following 13-15 months. Migrating such a comprehensive and vital system from an APL2 Mainframe to a Dyalog Microsoft Windows platform is no small task.

Automotive – Customisation

The Volvo Car Corporation (Volvo) offers a range of cars that is extremely diversified and changes frequently. The Common Product Authorization Master (CPAM) handles all the customisation data by working with array structured product data and operating as the common master for lots of product information at Volvo Cars.

Migration Project

One of Sweden's largest banks, serving 7.8 million private customers and more than 600,000 corporate and organisational customers, embarked on a migration project for their Management Accounting and Reporting System (MARS) from an APL2 Mainframe application to a Dyalog Microsoft Windows platform. The migration not only cut the bank's hardware running costs substantially, it also doubled the performance!

Lunch Service

From pupils to pensioners, through company lunches to birthday parties at the swimming pool – they all get their lunch on time. Using Dyalog, Jersie Data ApS in Denmark has developed a comprehensive online lunch shop; a country-wide network of suppliers ensure that more than 25,000 users can choose their lunch items online and get them delivered to the right place, at the right time – every day.

Childcare

When Sally and Chris Eaton developed their idea of creating an ePortfolio-based nursery training solution, little did they know they would create a company that has already enjoyed exponential growth and launch a benchmark-setting eLearning solution with the flexibility to beat off the effects of recession-imposed limitations in Learning and Skills Council funding.

Healthcare

TakeCare is a comprehensive integrated system for A&E, In-Patient and Out-Patient handling, sectioned patients, highly specialised treatments and standard healthcare requirements, produced by Profdoc Care AB in Sweden (a subsidiary of CompuGroup Medical). The service guarantees patients, as well as the healthcare providers, full security in terms of accessibility and integrity.

Analytics

Optima Systems's Galileo Cosmos offers true visual analytics. Powered by a multi-dimensional, unstructured analytical engine written entirely in APL, Cosmos is able to quickly and flexibly analyse vast quantities of data, then show that analysis in an interactive and dynamic display of interconnected data points.

Aerospace

Optima Systems develop new applications for a wide range of businesses. One of their tasks was to "Determine the necessary manpower around all of the manufacturing sites to support the assumed product delivery schedule." The task was manually intensive, prone to error and took a great deal of time to complete. Various options had previously been investigated but none gave the speed of delivery and flexibility that Dyalog promised.

Pharmaceutical

Optima Systems was approached by a major pharmaceutical manufacturing company who wanted to model how their new products would sell around the world, the revenues that they might earn and the sensitivity to marketing spend. To make this work they had to write a data driven model of how patients present to their doctors and the manner in which drugs are prescribed (or not) in response to their symptoms.

Financial

Optima Systems has been working for many years in the financial market place working on a variety of PC and mainframe applications. For one particular client where the applications had been in service for some time there arose an opportunity to automate and streamline some of their manual processes.

Clinical Trials

Optima Systems had a client who was a major collector of clinical survey data and needed a way of providing a tool that let their clients intelligently drill down through this vast amount of complex information. However, each compiled database had a very different structure to the other ones; the tool needed to allow for these variations and enable researchers to interrogate all the databases through a single, simple interface.

Dyalog simplified the bureaucracy and restored peace of mind. Automotive – Production Schedule The Volvo Car Corporation (Volvo) uses Hercules for planning car production. The migration not only cut the bank's hardware running costs substantially, it also doubled the performance! sentences.en: Simulation

blocks.html_en: In the Southern part of Finland, the Archipelago with its many small islands means that boats are the main means of transport. Navigating the area is extremely complex and can be dangerous and challenging due to traffic density and inclement weather conditions. This case study focuses on Finnish APL programmer Tomas Gustafsson and how he – and a tiny team – developed the incredible Stormwind navigation simulator, which won the Open Data Innovation Contest Apps4Finland in 2013.

blocks.html_en: One of Sweden's largest banks, serving 7.8 million private customers and more than 600,000 corporate and organisational customers, embarked on a migration project for their Management Accounting and Reporting System (MARS) from an APL2 Mainframe application to a Dyalog Microsoft Windows platform. The migration not only cut the bank's hardware running costs substantially, it also doubled the performance!

sentences.en: One of Sweden's largest banks, serving 7.8 million private customers and more than 600,000 corporate and organisational customers, embarked on a migration project for their Management Accounting and Reporting System (MARS) from an APL2 Mainframe application to a Dyalog Microsoft Windows platform.
sentences.zh: 瑞典最大的银行之一为 780 万私人客户和超过 600,000 个企业和组织客户提供服务，该银行开始实施将其管理会计和报告系统 (MARS) 从 APL2 大型机应用程序迁移到 Dyalog Microsoft Windows 平台的项目。

sentences.en: The migration not only cut the bank's hardware running costs substantially, it also doubled the performance!
sentences.zh: 此次迁移不仅大幅降低了银行的硬件运行成本，还将性能提升了一倍！

sentences.en: Lunch Service

sentences.zh: 从学生到养老金领取者，从公司午餐到游泳池的生日聚会——他们都准时吃午餐。

sentences.en: Using Dyalog, Jersie Data ApS in Denmark has developed a comprehensive online lunch shop; a country-wide network of suppliers ensure that more than 25,000 users can choose their lunch items online and get them delivered to the right place, at the right time – every day.
sentences.zh: 丹麦的 Jersie Data ApS 使用 Dyalog 开发了一家综合在线午餐店；覆盖全国的供应商网络确保超过 25,000 名用户每天都可以在线选择午餐食品，并在正确的时间将其送到正确的地点。

blocks.html_en: Childcare

sentences.en: Childcare
sentences.zh: 儿童保育

blocks.html_en: When Sally and Chris Eaton developed their idea of creating an ePortfolio-based nursery training solution, little did they know they would create a company that has already enjoyed exponential growth and launch a benchmark-setting eLearning solution with the flexibility to beat off the effects of recession-imposed limitations in Learning and Skills Council funding.

sentences.en: When Sally and Chris Eaton developed their idea of creating an ePortfolio-based nursery training solution, little did they know they would create a company that has already enjoyed exponential growth and launch a benchmark-setting eLearning solution with the flexibility to beat off the effects of recession-imposed limitations in Learning and Skills Council funding.
sentences.zh: 当 Sally 和 Chris Eaton 提出创建基于 ePortfolio 的幼儿园培训解决方案的想法时，他们几乎不知道自己会创建一家已经享受指数级增长的公司，并推出一个设定基准的电子学习解决方案，该解决方案能够灵活地克服经济衰退对学习和技能委员会资金限制的影响。

blocks.html_en: Healthcare

sentences.en: Healthcare
sentences.zh: 卫生保健

blocks.html_en: TakeCare is a comprehensive integrated system for A&E, In-Patient and Out-Patient handling, sectioned patients, highly specialised treatments and standard healthcare requirements, produced by Profdoc Care AB in Sweden (a subsidiary of CompuGroup Medical). The service guarantees patients, as well as the healthcare providers, full security in terms of accessibility and integrity.

sentences.en: TakeCare is a comprehensive integrated system for A&E, In-Patient and Out-Patient handling, sectioned patients, highly specialised treatments and standard healthcare requirements, produced by Profdoc Care AB in Sweden (a subsidiary of CompuGroup Medical).
sentences.zh: TakeCare 是一个全面的集成系统，用于急症室、住院和门诊处理、患者分诊、高度专业化的治疗和标准医疗保健要求，由瑞典 Profdoc Care AB（CompuGroup Medical 的子公司）生产。

sentences.en: The service guarantees patients, as well as the healthcare providers, full security in terms of accessibility and integrity.
sentences.zh: 该服务保证患者以及医疗保健提供者在可访问性和完整性方面获得充分的安全性。

blocks.html_en: Analytics

sentences.en: Analytics
sentences.zh: 分析

blocks.html_en: Optima Systems's Galileo Cosmos offers true visual analytics. Powered by a multi-dimensional, unstructured analytical engine written entirely in APL, Cosmos is able to quickly and flexibly analyse vast quantities of data, then show that analysis in an interactive and dynamic display of interconnected data points.

sentences.en: Optima Systems's Galileo Cosmos offers true visual analytics.
sentences.zh: Optima Systems 的 Galileo Cosmos 提供真正的可视化分析。

sentences.en: Powered by a multi-dimensional, unstructured analytical engine written entirely in APL, Cosmos is able to quickly and flexibly analyse vast quantities of data, then show that analysis in an interactive and dynamic display of interconnected data points.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 由完全用 APL 编写的多维、非结构化分析引擎提供支持，能够快速、灵活地分析大量数据，然后以交互式、动态的方式显示互连数据点的分析结果。

blocks.html_en: Aerospace

sentences.en: Aerospace
sentences.zh: 航天

One of their tasks was to "Determine the necessary manpower around all of the manufacturing sites to support the assumed product delivery schedule." The task was manually intensive, prone to error and took a great deal of time to complete. Various options had previously been investigated but none gave the speed of delivery and flexibility that Dyalog promised.

sentences.en: Optima Systems develop new applications for a wide range of businesses.
sentences.zh: Optima Systems 为广泛的企业开发新的应用程序。

sentences.en: One of their tasks was to "Determine the necessary manpower around all of the manufacturing sites to support the assumed product delivery schedule."
sentences.zh: 他们的任务之一是“确定所有制造基地周围必要的人力，以支持假定的产品交付计划。”

sentences.en: The task was manually intensive, prone to error and took a great deal of time to complete.
sentences.zh: 该任务需要大量人力，容易出错，并且需要花费大量时间才能完成。

sentences.en: Various options had previously been investigated but none gave the speed of delivery and flexibility that Dyalog promised.
sentences.zh: 之前已经研究过各种选项，但没有一个能够提供 Dyalog 所承诺的交付速度和灵活性。

blocks.html_en: Pharmaceutical

sentences.en: Pharmaceutical
sentences.zh: 制药

blocks.html_en: Optima Systems was approached by a major pharmaceutical manufacturing company who wanted to model how their new products would sell around the world, the revenues that they might earn and the sensitivity to marketing spend. To make this work they had to write a data driven model of how patients present to their doctors and the manner in which drugs are prescribed (or not) in response to their symptoms.

sentences.en: Optima Systems was approached by a major pharmaceutical manufacturing company who wanted to model how their new products would sell around the world, the revenues that they might earn and the sensitivity to marketing spend.
sentences.zh: 一家大型制药制造公司与 Optima Systems 接洽，该公司希望对其新产品在全球的销售方式、可能获得的收入以及对营销支出的敏感度进行建模。

sentences.en: To make this work they had to write a data driven model of how patients present to their doctors and the manner in which drugs are prescribed (or not) in response to their symptoms.
sentences.zh: 为了完成这项工作，他们必须编写一个数据驱动的模型，用于描述患者如何向医生陈述以及根据他们的症状开出（或不开出）药物的方式。

blocks.html_en: Financial

sentences.en: Financial
sentences.zh: 金融的

blocks.html_en: Optima Systems has been working for many years in the financial market place working on a variety of PC and mainframe applications. For one particular client where the applications had been in service for some time there arose an opportunity to automate and streamline some of their manual processes.

sentences.en: Optima Systems has been working for many years in the financial market place working on a variety of PC and mainframe applications.
sentences.zh: Optima Systems 多年来一直致力于金融市场的各种 PC 和大型机应用程序。

sentences.en: For one particular client where the applications had been in service for some time there arose an opportunity to automate and streamline some of their manual processes.
sentences.zh: 对于应用程序已经使用了一段时间的特定客户来说，出现了自动化和简化其一些手动流程的机会。

blocks.html_en: Clinical Trials

sentences.en: Clinical Trials
sentences.zh: 临床试验

blocks.html_en: Optima Systems had a client who was a major collector of clinical survey data and needed a way of providing a tool that let their clients intelligently drill down through this vast amount of complex information. However, each compiled database had a very different structure to the other ones; the tool needed to allow for these variations and enable researchers to interrogate all the databases through a single, simple interface.

sentences.en: Optima Systems had a client who was a major collector of clinical survey data and needed a way of providing a tool that let their clients intelligently drill down through this vast amount of complex information.
sentences.zh: Optima Systems 的一位客户是临床调查数据的主要收集者，需要一种提供工具的方法，让客户能够智能地深入了解大量复杂信息。

sentences.en: However, each compiled database had a very different structure to the other ones; the tool needed to allow for these variations and enable researchers to interrogate all the databases through a single, simple interface.
sentences.zh: 然而，每个编译的数据库都有与其他数据库截然不同的结构；该工具需要允许这些变化，并使研究人员能够通过一个简单的界面查询所有数据库。

content_html_zh:
单击下面的图像以了解有关相应研究的更多信息。

模拟

在芬兰南部，群岛上有许多小岛屿，这意味着船只是主要的交通工具。 由于交通密度和恶劣的天气条件，该地区的航行极其复杂，并且可能非常危险且具有挑战性。 本案例研究重点介绍芬兰 APL 程序员 Tomas Gustafsson 以及他和一个小团队如何开发令人难以置信的暴风城导航模拟器，该模拟器赢得了 2013 年 Apps4Finland 开放数据创新大赛的冠军。

教育

为近 700 名小学生经营一所新成立的学院可能会涉及大量文书工作。 协调接送服务、在多个站点之间运行班车、接受放学前和放学后俱乐部的预订、跟踪每个学生的医疗/饮食要求以及允许家长提前预订学校膳食可能是一场后勤噩梦。 Dyalog 简化了官僚机构并恢复了内心的平静。

汽车 – 生产计划

沃尔沃汽车公司 (Volvo) 使用 Hercules 来规划汽车生产。 其主要产出是每月的主生产计划（MPS）——关于未来 13-15 个月内每个市场、工厂和每周生产多少辆汽车的详细计划。 将如此全面且重要的系统从 APL2 大型机迁移到 Dyalog Microsoft Windows 平台并非易事。

汽车 – 定制

沃尔沃汽车公司（沃尔沃）提供一系列极其多样化且变化频繁的汽车。 通用产品授权主控 (CPAM) 通过使用数组结构化产品数据来处理所有定制数据，并作为沃尔沃汽车大量产品信息的通用主控进行操作。

移民项目

瑞典最大的银行之一为 780 万私人客户和超过 600,000 个企业和组织客户提供服务，该银行开始实施将其管理会计和报告系统 (MARS) 从 APL2 大型机应用程序迁移到 Dyalog Microsoft Windows 平台的项目。 此次迁移不仅大幅降低了银行的硬件运行成本，还将性能提升了一倍！

午餐服务

从学生到养老金领取者，从公司午餐到游泳池的生日聚会——他们都准时吃午餐。 丹麦的 Jersie Data ApS 使用 Dyalog 开发了一家综合在线午餐店；覆盖全国的供应商网络确保超过 25,000 名用户每天都可以在线选择午餐食品，并在正确的时间将其送到正确的地点。

儿童保育

当 Sally 和 Chris Eaton 提出创建基于 ePortfolio 的幼儿园培训解决方案的想法时，他们几乎不知道自己会创建一家已经享受指数级增长的公司，并推出一个设定基准的电子学习解决方案，该解决方案能够灵活地克服经济衰退对学习和技能委员会资金限制的影响。

卫生保健

TakeCare 是一个全面的集成系统，用于急症室、住院和门诊处理、患者分诊、高度专业化的治疗和标准医疗保健要求，由瑞典 Profdoc Care AB（CompuGroup Medical 的子公司）生产。 该服务保证患者以及医疗保健提供者在可访问性和完整性方面获得充分的安全性。

分析

Optima Systems 的 Galileo Cosmos 提供真正的可视化分析。 Cosmos 由完全用 APL 编写的多维、非结构化分析引擎提供支持，能够快速、灵活地分析大量数据，然后以交互式、动态的方式显示互连数据点的分析结果。

航天

Optima Systems 为广泛的企业开发新的应用程序。 他们的任务之一是“确定所有制造基地周围必要的人力，以支持假定的产品交付计划。” 该任务需要大量人力，容易出错，并且需要花费大量时间才能完成。 之前已经研究过各种选项，但没有一个能够提供 Dyalog 所承诺的交付速度和灵活性。

制药

一家大型制药制造公司与 Optima Systems 接洽，该公司希望对其新产品在全球的销售方式、可能获得的收入以及对营销支出的敏感度进行建模。 为了完成这项工作，他们必须编写一个数据驱动的模型，用于描述患者如何向医生陈述以及根据他们的症状开出（或不开出）药物的方式。

金融的

Optima Systems 多年来一直致力于金融市场的各种 PC 和大型机应用程序。 对于应用程序已经使用了一段时间的特定客户来说，出现了自动化和简化其一些手动流程的机会。

临床试验

Optima Systems 的一位客户是临床调查数据的主要收集者，需要一种提供工具的方法，让客户能够智能地深入了解大量复杂信息。 然而，每个编译的数据库都有与其他数据库截然不同的结构；该工具需要允许这些变化，并使研究人员能够通过一个简单的界面查询所有数据库。
